prompts.name: Main System Prompt
prompts.description: The primary system prompt for Claude Code. Assembled dynamically from multiple sections including intro, system, doing tasks, actions, using tools, tone/style, and output efficiency.
prompts.notes: This is the static portion. Dynamic sections (env info, memory, MCP instructions, etc.) are appended at runtime.

prompts.name: Default Agent Prompt
prompts.description: Default system prompt used for subagents spawned by the Agent tool.

prompts.name: Autonomous/Proactive Agent Prompt
prompts.description: System prompt for autonomous/proactive mode. Includes tick handling, pacing, sleep behavior, terminal focus awareness, and bias toward action.

prompts.name: Cyber Risk Instruction
prompts.description: Security boundary instruction owned by the Safeguards team. Defines acceptable security assistance vs harmful activities.
prompts.notes: DO NOT MODIFY WITHOUT SAFEGUARDS TEAM REVIEW (David Forsythe, Kyla Guru)

prompts.name: Agent Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the Agent tool that launches specialized subagents. Includes agent listing, usage notes, when not to use, writing prompt guidance, and examples.
prompts.notes: Has two variants: fork-enabled (with 'When to fork' section) and standard. Agent list can be inline or via attachment.

prompts.name: Bash Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the Bash tool. Includes tool preferences, command execution guidelines, git commit/PR instructions, and sandbox configuration.
prompts.notes: Includes extensive git safety protocol, commit workflow, and PR creation instructions. Sandbox section is dynamically generated.

prompts.name: File Edit Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the Edit tool that performs exact string replacements in files.

prompts.name: File Read Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the Read tool. Supports files, images, PDFs, and Jupyter notebooks.
prompts.notes: Line format and max size instructions are computed at runtime.

prompts.name: File Write Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the Write tool that creates or overwrites files.

prompts.name: Glob Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Description/prompt for the Glob tool for fast file pattern matching.

prompts.name: Grep Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Description/prompt for the Grep tool built on ripgrep.

prompts.name: LSP Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the LSP tool that interacts with Language Server Protocol servers for code intelligence.

prompts.name: Notebook Edit Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the NotebookEdit tool that modifies Jupyter notebook cells.

prompts.name: PowerShell Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the PowerShell tool on Windows. Includes edition-specific syntax guidance (5.1 vs 7+), here-string handling, and PS-specific notes.
prompts.notes: Detects PowerShell edition at runtime (Desktop 5.1 vs Core 7+) and adjusts syntax guidance.

prompts.name: Ask User Question Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the AskUserQuestion tool that presents multiple choice questions to users.

prompts.name: Brief/SendUserMessage Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the SendUserMessage tool used in proactive/Kairos mode. Includes the 'Talking to the user' section explaining visibility rules.

prompts.name: Config Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the Config tool that gets/sets Claude Code configuration settings.
prompts.notes: Settings list and model options are generated dynamically from the settings registry.

prompts.name: Enter Plan Mode Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the EnterPlanMode tool. Has two variants: external (more aggressive about using plan mode) and ant-internal (more conservative).
prompts.notes: External users get prompted to plan more often; ant-internal users are encouraged to just start working unless genuinely ambiguous.

prompts.name: Exit Plan Mode Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the ExitPlanMode tool that signals plan completion and requests user approval.

prompts.name: Enter Worktree Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the EnterWorktree tool that creates isolated git worktrees.

prompts.name: Exit Worktree Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the ExitWorktree tool that exits a worktree session and returns to the original directory.

prompts.name: List MCP Resources Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for listing available MCP server resources.

prompts.name: Read MCP Resource Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for reading a specific MCP server resource by URI.

prompts.name: Remote Trigger Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for managing scheduled remote Claude Code agents via the claude.ai CCR API.

prompts.name: Cron Scheduling Tools Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the CronCreate tool that schedules recurring or one-shot tasks using cron syntax. Includes durability options and jitter guidance.

prompts.name: Send Message Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the SendMessage tool used for inter-agent communication in teams. Includes protocol responses for shutdown and plan approval.

prompts.name: Skill Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the Skill tool that executes slash commands/skills within the conversation.

prompts.name: Sleep Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the Sleep tool used in proactive mode to wait between actions without holding a shell process.

prompts.name: Todo Write Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the TodoWrite tool for creating and managing structured task lists. Includes extensive examples of when to use and when not to use.

prompts.name: Tool Search Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the ToolSearch tool that fetches full schema definitions for deferred/lazy-loaded tools.

prompts.name: Web Fetch Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the WebFetch tool that fetches and processes web content using a secondary AI model.
prompts.notes: Has a secondary model prompt for processing fetched content with copyright-respecting guidelines.

prompts.name: Web Search Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the WebSearch tool. Requires mandatory Sources section in responses. Current month is injected dynamically.

prompts.name: Task Create Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the TaskCreate tool that creates structured tasks for coding sessions, with optional teammate context.

prompts.name: Task Get Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the TaskGet tool that retrieves a task by ID with full details and dependencies.

prompts.name: Task List Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the TaskList tool. Includes teammate workflow section when agent swarms are enabled.

prompts.name: Task Update Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the TaskUpdate tool that updates task status, ownership, dependencies, and details.

prompts.name: Task Stop Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the TaskStop tool that terminates running background tasks.

prompts.name: Team Create Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the TeamCreate tool that creates multi-agent teams. Includes comprehensive team workflow, task ownership, message delivery, and idle state documentation.

prompts.name: Team Delete Tool Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the TeamDelete tool that removes team and task directories after swarm work is complete.

prompts.name: Compact/Summarization Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt used when compacting/summarizing conversation context. Produces a structured 9-section summary preserving technical details. Has base, partial, and partial-up-to variants.
prompts.notes: Includes NO_TOOLS_PREAMBLE to prevent tool calls during summarization. Analysis section is stripped from final output.

prompts.name: Magic Docs Update Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for updating Magic Doc files with new learnings from conversations. Uses {{variable}} template syntax. Can be customized at ~/.claude/magic-docs/prompt.md.

prompts.name: Session Memory Update Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for updating session memory/notes files. Preserves section structure and italic template descriptions. Can be customized at ~/.claude/session-memory/config/prompt.md.

prompts.name: Session Memory Template
prompts.description: Default template for session memory files with sections: Session Title, Current State, Task specification, Files and Functions, Workflow, Errors & Corrections, Codebase Documentation, Learnings, Key results, Worklog.

prompts.name: Memory Extraction Agent Prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for the background memory extraction subagent that analyzes recent messages and saves persistent memories (user, feedback, project, reference types).
prompts.notes: Has two variants: auto-only (single directory) and combined (auto + team memory with scope guidance). Runs as a fork of the main conversation.

prompts.name: Companion/Buddy Prompt
prompts.description: System prompt addendum introducing the companion creature (small animal beside the input box). Tells the model to stay out of the way when the user addresses the companion.

prompts.name: Claude in Chrome Browser Automation Prompt
prompts.description: System prompt for browser automation via the Claude in Chrome extension. Covers GIF recording, console debugging, alert handling, and tab management.

prompts.name: Teammate System Prompt Addendum
prompts.description: Addendum appended to the system prompt for agent teammates. Explains that text output is not visible to other agents — must use SendMessage tool.

prompts.name: Scratchpad Directory Instructions
prompts.description: Instructions for using the session-specific scratchpad directory instead of /tmp for temporary files.
prompts.notes: Only included when scratchpad is enabled in settings.
